{{8TeamBracket-Tennis5
|RD1=Quarterfinals
|RD2=Semifinals
|RD3=Final
|RD1-team1='''{{flagicon|ITA}} [[Jannik Sinner]]'''
|RD1-score1-1='''7'''
|RD1-score1-2='''7<sup>7</sup>'''
|RD1-score1-3='''6'''
|RD1-team2={{flagicon|GER}} [[Jan-Lennard Struff]]
|RD1-score2-1=5
|RD1-score2-2=6<sup>4</sup>
|RD1-score2-3=3
|RD1-team3={{flagicon|CAN}} [[Félix Auger-Aliassime]]
|RD1-score3-1=6
|RD1-team4={{flagicon|SRB}} [[Novak Djokovic]]
|RD1-score4-1=5
|RD1-team5='''{{flagicon|USA}} [[Taylor Fritz]]'''
|RD1-score5-1=w/o
|RD1-team6={{flagicon|AUS}} [[Alex de Minaur]]
|RD1-score6-1=
}}
